summary: Crew Chat Media Features Testing Complete. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. All new media endpoints working: GET /api/crew-chat/quick-actions (returns 14 quick actions in 4 categories), POST /api/crew-chat/{id}/upload-image (validates file type, requires user_id), POST /api/crew-chat/{id}/upload-voice (enforces 30s max duration), GET /api/uploads/crew_chat/{filename} (serves media files). Frontend: All UI elements present and functional - Quick Actions panel with 8 buttons, Camera button for image upload, Mic button for voice recording, voice playback with play/pause.
critical_code_review_comments: crew_chat.py: QUICK_ACTIONS constant defines 14 pre-set messages in 4 categories (status, conditions, logistics, vibes)
crew_chat.py: upload-image endpoint validates ALLOWED_IMAGE_TYPES (jpeg, png, webp) and MAX_IMAGE_SIZE (10MB)
crew_chat.py: upload-voice endpoint enforces MAX_VOICE_DURATION (30 seconds) and MAX_VOICE_SIZE (2MB)
crew_chat.py: Voice files saved with appropriate extensions (webm, m4a, wav, ogg)
uploads.py: get_crew_chat_media sets correct content-type for audio files
CrewChat.js: Voice recording uses MediaRecorder API with 30s max timer
CrewChat.js: Image preview modal with caption input before sending
CrewChat.js: Voice playback with play/pause toggle and duration display

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All media features present and functional

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test booking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Crew Chat media features fully tested. Quick Actions: GET /api/crew-chat/quick-actions returns 14 actions in 4 categories. Image Upload: POST /api/crew-chat/{id}/upload-image with file, user_id, caption. Voice Upload: POST /api/crew-chat/{id}/upload-voice with file, user_id, duration (max 30s). Media Serving: GET /api/uploads/crew_chat/{filename}. Frontend has Zap icon for quick actions, Camera for images, Mic for voice. Voice messages show play/pause button with duration.

GET_quick_actions.details: Returns 14 quick actions in 4 categories (status, conditions, logistics, vibes). Sample: 'On my way! 🏄', 'Waves are pumping! 🌊'

POST_upload_image.details: Validates image types (jpeg, png, webp), max 10MB, requires user_id. Returns success, message_id, media_url

POST_upload_voice.details: Validates audio types, enforces 30s max duration, max 2MB. Returns success, message_id, media_url, duration

GET_crew_chat_media.details: Serves uploaded files with correct content-type for audio (webm, m4a, wav, ogg)

frontend_quick_actions_panel.details: Zap icon toggles Quick Actions panel with 8 pre-set message buttons. Clicking sends message immediately

frontend_image_upload_button.details: Camera icon (data-testid='image-upload-btn') opens file picker. Image preview modal with caption before sending

frontend_voice_record_button.details: Mic icon (data-testid='voice-record-btn') starts recording with timer. 30s max enforced with progress bar

frontend_voice_playback.details: Voice messages show play/pause button with duration (e.g., '0:05'). Clicking toggles playback

frontend_message_types.details: Chat displays text, image, and voice messages with appropriate UI. Voice shows play button, images are clickable to expand

mocked_apis.note: OneSignal push notifications are MOCKED/skipped when API key not configured. All other endpoints use real database operations.

screenshots_evidence: crew_chat_quick_actions.png - Shows Quick Actions panel with 8 buttons at bottom of chat
crew_chat_page.png - Shows full chat with messages including voice message (0:05 duration) and quick action messages
